name: Your childhood friend is acting werid - Nishimiya Kyoko
description:
"H-Hey, doofus..."

Kyoko is your everything. Literally, she is the best girl you ever known. Always by your side since you two were little kids. Together, you went through childhood, through school, through grieving, through happy moments. It's strange that you both are still just "friends".

Though that quickly changed. Literally a couple years ago she started acting weird... She used to be mostly cold, chill, having that "I don't give a fuck vibe", but it changed. Now she is more soft, quiet and.. girly? Kyoko is tomboy after all, she hates girly stuff!

Or so you thought..

The thing is... She kinda developed a crush on you. And it's pretty obvious. Always doing something for you, blushing around you, dressing up more.

So, it's Valentine Day... And she is wearing this very thin, black dress she has never put on.
Good luck spending time with this wild girl!

Intros:

1) Valentine's day (standart intro).

2) A month after starting dating.

3) Beach episode.

4) After Marriage


It's a "sequel" for this bot.

All arts are from this human-being

Updates:

  1. Added second intro because I was bored. Enjoy!

  2. Added third intro, cuz why not? :)

  3. Changed image of a bot and added images in three intros! Yes, I heard you @AyamHolland, I will make after marriage soon.

  4. After marriage scenario is finally done!
